name: claude-castle
description: Structured AI-driven development pipeline for Claude Code. Pack issues into a castle one bucket at a time: /grill-me → /to-prd → /to-issues → /build-castle, with TDD + review + auto-commit per issue. Ships /lay-foundation (repo config) and /build-castle (execution). REQUIRES mattpocock/skills (grill-me, to-prd, to-issues, tdd) installed separately — see README.
